hero.title: Transform your optics management with OptiFlow
hero.description: Connect consultation, sales, and laboratory in a single platform. Eliminate communication errors, reduce wait times, and increase the profitability of your optics.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything your optics needs to scale to the next level.

consultations.title: Consultation Management
consultations.description: Smart scheduling with automatic reminders to reduce absences.

inventory.title: Real Inventory
inventory.description: Exact control of frames and lenses with low stock alerts.

laboratory.title: Laboratory
laboratory.description: Order tracking from prescription to final delivery.

crm.title: Patient CRM
crm.description: Complete clinical history and personalized loyalty programs.

sales.title: Sales & POS
sales.description: Fast invoicing and daily income reports.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Key profitability metrics for data-driven decisions.

pricing-section.description:
We offer different subscription models that adapt to you and scale with your needs with unique benefits
to grow your optical store.

lite.name: Basic
lite.tagline:
Discover and explore the use
of OptiFlow
features: Record accurate medical histories and prescriptions.
Generate quotes and balance your cash register.
Search for frames in real time.

pro.name: Professional
pro.tagline:
Experience the power of
endless possibilities
features: Everything included in the Lite Plan
Customers can view the status of their lenses and their balance online.
Automatic notifications: Email or WhatsApp when the lens is ready.
Advanced Clinic: Capture digital signatures and upload PDFs of external exams.

max.name: Enterprise
max.tagline:
Unlock the maximum
performance of OptiFlow
features: Everything included in the Pro Plan
Measure sales conversion, productivity and laboratory times.
Customer recovery campaigns and automatic annual reminders.
Post-delivery NPS surveys and referral code system.
Record patients in rural campaigns without internet and sync later.

pricing-section.disclaimer:
Prices shown do not include applicable taxes. Prices and plans are
subject to change at the discretion of OptiFlow. For Enterprise plans contact an advisor.

client.heading: Are you a client?
client.subtitle: Do you feel you're not getting responses from optics? Long delays and lack of communication?
client.description: OptiFlow allows you to track the status of your order from a web application, without having to visit the store in person or constantly ask for updates from the company.

optics.heading: Are you an optics?
optics.description1: Improve your company's CRM through the client application, enhance the issuance and tracking of orders and appointments, improve the registration, creation and analysis of sales, and organize your client information.
optics.description2: Our system will accelerate your workflow, minimizing the margin of error by digitalizing and concentrating all communication in a single practical and easy-to-use system.

cta.heading: Get OptiFlow Now!
cta.satisfied-clients: no satisfied clients | one satisfied client | +{n}k satisfied clients
